Current Role · Angel One

Building a Finance Channel
People Actually Watch.

Angel One is one of India's largest stockbroking and fintech companies. In July 2025, I took over Angel One Markets on YouTube and built it end-to-end — strategy, scripting, on-camera, moodboard, Shorts rollout, and analytics. Everything.

In under 9 months: 32K+ subscribers, 1.8M+ lifetime views, 116K+ watch hours, multiple videos crossing 1 lakh.

▶  Visit Channel
What I Own — End to End
🎯
Channel & Content Strategy
Full ownership — what goes up, when, why. Every decision, mine.
📚
Research & Scripting
Turned raw data and complex finance into stories people stay for.
🎨
Visual Identity & Moodboard
Built the entire visual direction — moodboard, 60/30/10 colour system, thumbnail language.
🎥
On-Camera Creator & Host
The face of the channel — scripted content, ads, integrations, all me.
⚡
Shorts & News Rollout
Daily morning Shorts pipeline — market news before the market opens.
📊
Analytics & Iteration
Watch time, CTR, retention — every upload is a data point fed back in.

Behind the Story

What Goes Into
Making a Video

Research, visual strategy, data design — before a single frame is shot.

Scroll to explore
Channel Moodboard & Colour SystemVisual direction, 60/30/10 colour rule, the palette used across every video.
Data-First StorytellingEvery stat becomes a visual — designed to hook in the first 10 seconds.
Section & Template DesignConsistent visual language — headers, layout templates, graphic hierarchy.
Research & Reference WorkNews tracking, source gathering — every video starts with what the audience needs next.

The Craft Behind the Content

Why I Can Tell Any Story.

Before content, I was a theatre actor and writer — writing monologues, performing on stage. Three years preparing for UPSC gave me depth across history, polity, economy, geography.

Storytelling instinct, subject-matter range, platform mechanics. I know what people want to hear, and when.

The subject keeps changing. The scroll-stopping doesn't.

Swati Shukla

A storyteller who knows
what you want to hear.

Years of listening — to audiences, data, and the news — turned into content that makes people stop scrolling and start thinking.
